name: Entrance of The &gMaze &cof &rDeath&n
description:
You have walked into a high ground and from here it's possible to see what
awaits for you just ahead a maze...  Yes you will have to cross it...  Yes it
will be difficult, but what kind of hero would be you if you couldn't cross a
maze ? Enought talking, go now and face you destiny, face THE MAZE
